From: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update
Date: Mon, 2 Mar 2026 09:14:32 -0500

Alice,

Following our call on Friday, I wanted to confirm in writing the situation
with the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches for the NGIS Phase 3 data centre
migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected outbound shipments since
February 26. We have now confirmed a 2-week delay on the network equipment
originally scheduled to arrive at your Gatineau facility on March 6. The
revised estimated delivery date is March 20, 2026.

I understand this creates significant pressure on your Q2 migration
timeline. To be transparent: we are currently single-sourced on this
product line through our Montreal warehouse, and alternative routing via
our Vancouver depot would add a further 3–5 business days.

I deeply regret the inconvenience. Our team is working around the clock to
expedite the shipment.

Please let me know how we can best support your planning activities during
this disruption.

Best regards,
Jason Henderson
Account Manager — Federal Public Sector
TechSupplier Solutions Inc.
613-555-0182

---

Original message:

From: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Sent: Friday, February 28, 2026 4:45 PM
To: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
Subject: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update

Jason, can you please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst
switches? Our migration window opens March 8 and we need the equipment
on site no later than March 6 for staging and testing.

Thanks,
Alice
